name: ReconciliationProjectionDecisionAndCoverage
description: Read-only candidate projections plus append-only statement-authoritative decisions, replacement history, current state, statement scopes, coverage, and exceptions.
schema_def: candidate_projection: opaque token, evidenceId/fingerprint, policy/version, compatible and guard candidates with bases/rejections, conflicts, expiry; advisory only. reconciliation_decision: id, evidenceId, optional priorTransactionId and activeTransactionId, disposition deterministic_match|owner_confirmed_match|statement_correction|statement_only|ambiguous|exception|rejected|revoked|replaced, policy/version, matchBasis, deterministic_policy|owner authority, statementAuthorityBasis, reason, actor/time, optional previousDecisionId. statement_correction references supersession, replacement fact, category/pool carry-forward, payment carry-forward or explicit unknown initialization, and any invariant-preserving relationship replacement event IDs. Current state derives as recorded_unreconciled, statement_reconciled with confirmed_existing|corrected_from_statement detail, statement_only, recorded_absent_from_statement, ambiguous_match, owner_confirmed_match, or reconciliation_exception. Statement scope/coverage retain account-period manifest references and outcomes. No overwrite; one active economic effect; invalid relationship replacement blocks correction; ambiguity never auto-applies.
